caseStudy.title: Payment Conversion Optimization
caseStudy.description: Lifting checkout conversion through frictionless payment flows.
caseStudy.overview: A subscription SaaS company was losing a significant portion of potential customers at the payment step due to a cumbersome multi-page checkout flow, limited payment method support, and poor mobile UX. The goal was to redesign the payment experience to minimise drop-off.
caseStudy.problem: The checkout flow required 7 form fields and 3 page transitions, with no support for digital wallets or local payment methods. Mobile conversion rates were 40% lower than desktop, and error messages were cryptic and unhelpful.
caseStudy.solution: The checkout was rebuilt as a single-page experience with smart field autofill, real-time card validation, and support for 12 local payment methods including digital wallets. Error messages were redesigned with actionable guidance. Link-based checkout was introduced for returning customers.

results.summary: The redesigned checkout is the highest-converting in the company's history. The addition of local payment methods opened new markets in Southeast Asia and Latin America.
